response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack and software development experience, including work with low-latency systems and embedded technologies, but lacks direct experience in embedded networking security or Japanese language proficiency, which are critical for this role. Their C/C++ experience is limited and not recent, and their networking/security expertise is not clearly demonstrated in the resume.
strengths: Strong background in software development with diverse technical stacks (e.g., Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, C/C++).
Experience with low-latency systems and real-time data processing, relevant to embedded systems.
Proven ability to collaborate across teams and contribute to open-source projects, demonstrating adaptability.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded networking security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X, switch chip knowledge).
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency, a hard requirement for the role.
C programming experience is outdated (last noted in 2015) and not focused on UNIX/Linux kernel development.
